title: Macquarie announces launch of Macquarie Focused International Core Equity ETF
content:
Macquarie Group (OTCPK:MCQEF [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MCQEF]) (OTCPK:MQBKY [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MQBKY]) said [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20140984-macquarie-asset-management-launches-focused-international-core-equity-etf] on Wednesday that its asset management unit is expanding its active exchange-traded fund platform with the launch of Macquarie Focused International Core Equity ETF (NASDAQ:EXUS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/EXUS]).

The new ETF seeks to capitalize on opportunities in international markets with 35-45 stocks with "underappreciated long-run earnings drivers".
